00024 #include "wrappers.h"
00025 
00026 #include "class.h"
00027 #include "jstring.h"
00028 #include "interpreter.h"
00029 #include "loader.h"
00030 #include "memory.h"
00031 #include "method.h"
00032 #include "thread.h"
00033 #include "utf8_string.h"
00034 #include "util.h"
00035 #include "vm.h"
00036 
00037 #include "java_lang_Thread.h"
00038 
00039 /******************************************************************************
00040  * Virtual machine related type definitions                                   *
00041  ******************************************************************************/
00042 
00045 struct virtual_machine_t {
00046     // Tracing and printing facilities
00047 #if JEL_TRACE
00048     bool trace_bytecodes; 
00049     bool trace_methods; 
00050 #endif // JEL_TRACE
00051 #if JEL_PRINT
00052     bool print_bytecodes; 
00053     bool print_methods; 
00054 #endif // JEL_PRINT
00055 };
00056 
00058 typedef struct virtual_machine_t virtual_machine_t;
00059 
00060 /******************************************************************************
00061  * Globals                                                                    *
00062  ******************************************************************************/
00063 
00066 options_t options = {
00067     ".", // classpath
00068     JEL_CLASSPATH_DIR, // boot_classpath
00069     128 * 1024, // heap_size
00070     4096, // stack_size
00071     NULL, // main_class
00072     NULL, // jargs
00073     0, // jargs_n
00074 
00075 #if JEL_TRACE
00076     false, // trace_methods
00077     false, // trace_opcodes
00078 #endif // JEL_TRACE
00079 
00080 #if JEL_PRINT
00081     false, // print_methods
00082     false, // print_opcodes
00083     false, // print_memory
00084 #endif // JEL_PRINT
00085 
00086     false, // version
00087     false // help
00088 };
00089 
00091 virtual_machine_t vm;
00092 
00093 /******************************************************************************
00094  * Local function prototypes                                                  *
00095  ******************************************************************************/
00096 
00097 static void vm_init( void );
00098 static void vm_teardown( void );
00099 
00100 /******************************************************************************
00101  * Virtual machine related functions implementation                           *
00102  ******************************************************************************/
00103 
00106 void vm_run( void )
00107 {
00108     int jargc = opts_get_jargs_n();
00109     char * const *jargv = opts_get_jargs();
00110     char *main_class;
00111     thread_t main_thread;
00112     class_t *cl, *thread_cl;
00113     method_t *method;
00114     uintptr_t args, ref;
00115     uintptr_t *args_data;
00116     int exception;
00117 
00118     // The main thread is initialized early because we need it for exceptions
00119     tm_init();
00120     thread_init(&main_thread);
00121     tm_register(&main_thread);
00122 
00123     c_try {
00124         vm_init();
00125 
00126         /* We initialize the temporary root pointers storage of the main thread
00127          * so that we can push temporary roots early in the bootstrap process */
00128         main_thread.roots.capacity = THREAD_TMP_ROOTS;
00129         main_thread.roots.pointers = gc_malloc(THREAD_TMP_ROOTS
00130                                                * sizeof(uintptr_t *));
00131 
00132         main_class = utf8_intern(opts_get_main_class(),
00133                                  strlen(opts_get_main_class()));
00134 
00135         /* Check if the 'main' string purged from the trailing '0' is in the
00136          * limited UTF8 format supported by Java */
00137         if (!utf8_check(main_class)) {
00138             c_throw(JAVA_LANG_NOCLASSDEFFOUNDERROR,
00139                     "Invalid class name: %s", main_class);
00140         }
00141 
00142         /* java.lang.String, java.lang.Class, java.lang.Thread and the array
00143          * class [C must be preloaded as they are needed by constant string
00144          * objects and class objects respectively */
00145         bcl_preload_bootstrap_classes();
00146 
00147         // Resolve the bootstrap classes
00148         bcl_resolve_class(NULL, "java/lang/Object");
00149         bcl_resolve_class(NULL, "[C");
00150         bcl_resolve_class(NULL, "java/lang/String");
00151         thread_cl = bcl_resolve_class(NULL, "java/lang/Thread");
00152 
00153         // Enable the garbage-collector now that it is safe to do so
00154         gc_enable(true);
00155 
00156         // Setup the dummy methods
00157         init_dummy_methods();
00158 
00159 #if JEL_FINALIZER
00160         /* Create the finalizer thread: find the jelatine.VMFinalizer class and
00161          * find its run() method */
00162         cl = bcl_resolve_class(NULL, "jelatine/VMFinalizer");
00163         method = mm_get(cl->method_manager, "run", "()V");
00164         assert(method != NULL);
00165 
00166         /* Create the finalizer Java thread object, since it is not created
00167          * by VMThread.start() we have to do it by hand */
00168         ref = gc_new(thread_cl);
00169         gc_register_finalizer(ref);
00170         JAVA_LANG_THREAD_REF2PTR(ref)->priority = 5;
00171         thread_push_root(&ref);
00172         // After this call has returned the finalizer thread will be running
00173         thread_launch(&ref, method);
00174         thread_pop_root();
00175 #endif // JEL_FINALIZER
00176 
00177         cl = bcl_resolve_class(NULL, main_class);
00178         // Find the main() method
00179         method = mm_get(cl->method_manager, "main", "([Ljava/lang/String;)V");
00180 
00181         if (method == NULL) {
00182             c_throw(JAVA_LANG_NOCLASSDEFFOUNDERROR,
00183                     "Unable to find the main() method in class: %s",
00184                     main_class);
00185         } else if (!method_is_public(method)
00186                    || method_is_native(method)
00187                    || !method_is_static(method))
00188         {
00189             c_throw(JAVA_LANG_NOCLASSDEFFOUNDERROR,
00190                     "main() method is not public, native or non-static");
00191         }
00192 
00193         method->access_flags |= ACC_MAIN;
00194 
00195         // Prepare the 'args' array holding command line arguments
00196         args = gc_new_array_ref(bcl_resolve_class(NULL, "[Ljava/lang/String;"),
00197                                 jargc);
00198         args_data = array_ref_get_data((array_t *) args);
00199         thread_push_root(&args);
00200 
00201         for (int i = 0; i < jargc; i++) {
00202             args_data[-i] =
00203                 JAVA_LANG_STRING_PTR2REF(jstring_create_literal(jargv[i]));
00204         }
00205 
00206         // Launch the main thread
00207         ref = thread_create_main(&main_thread, method, &args);
00208         thread_pop_root();
00209 
00210         if (ref != JNULL) {
00211             // TODO: Print the type of the unknown exception and its contents
00212             c_throw(JAVA_LANG_VIRTUALMACHINEERROR,
00213                     "Uncaught exception in main thread");
00214         }
00215     } c_catch (exception) {
00216         c_print_exception(exception);
00217         c_clear_exception();
00218         vm_fail();
00219     }
00220 
00221     /* The thread manager is destroyed before the other VM structures because
00222      * we need to stop all the running threads before doing anything else */
00223     tm_teardown();
00224     vm_teardown();
00225 } // vm_run()
00226 
00229 static void vm_init( void )
00230 {
00231     // Initialize the various subsystems
00232     gc_init(opts_get_heap_size());
00233     monitor_init();
00234     string_manager_init(6, 2);
00235     jsm_init(6, 2);
00236     classpath_init();
00237     bcl_init();
00238 
00239     // Initialize the VM structure
00240     memset(&vm, 0, sizeof(virtual_machine_t));
00241 } // vm_init()
00242 
00245 static void vm_teardown( void )
00246 {
00247     classpath_teardown();
00248     gc_teardown();
00249 } // vm_teardown()
Generated on Mon Mar 14 2016 15:25:27 for @PACKAGE_NAME@ by  1.7.1
